author: Brandjuh
description: Building request system with Google Maps link parsing, admin approval workflow, and comprehensive statistics tracking.
install_msg:
Thank you for installing BuildingManager! 🏢

**Quick Setup:**
1. `[p]buildset requestchannel #channel` - Where users request
2. `[p]buildset adminchannel #channel` - Where admins review
3. `[p]buildset logchannel #channel` - Where actions log
4. `[p]buildset adminrole @role` - Who can approve/reject
5. `[p]buildset post` - Post the request button

**Optional:**
• `[p]buildset buttonmessage <text>` - Custom button text

**Features:**
✅ Google Maps link parsing & coordinate extraction
✅ Building name detection from Google Maps place links
✅ Admin approval workflow with preset rejection reasons
✅ Comprehensive statistics tracking
✅ SQLite database storage

**Commands:**
• `[p]buildstats` - View statistics
• `[p]help BuildingManager` - Full command list

Need help? Check the README on GitHub!
short: Building request system with Google Maps location parsing and statistics
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs, usernames, and building request data in a SQLite database for statistics and logging purposes. No other personal data is stored.
